title: StudioDash Website & SEO Analytics
seoTitle: StudioDash Website and SEO Analytics | BarkinMad Studios
description: StudioDash website and SEO analytics for Cloudflare traffic and Google Search Console visibility.
summary: StudioDash combines website traffic and search visibility signals so developers can review how their sites and product pages are performing.
heroImageAlt: StudioDash website and SEO analytics dashboard

referenceImage.alt: StudioDash website and SEO analytics dashboard

sections.heading: Website analytics
paragraphs: StudioDash documents Cloudflare as the main website analytics provider. Cloudflare coverage can support traffic, requests, page views, top pages, countries, provider health, and operational website signals where the connected account exposes that data.
For developers with product websites, support pages, or launch pages, this creates a practical companion to app revenue and app status monitoring.

sections.heading: SEO visibility
paragraphs: Google Search Console coverage is documented for search clicks, impressions, CTR, average position, top queries, indexed pages, sitemap status, and validation signals where provider access is configured.
The goal is to help developers notice whether search visibility is improving, whether indexing issues need attention, and which pages or queries deserve follow-up.

sections.heading: Quality context
paragraphs: Website and SEO analytics should be read together with revenue, app release status, and provider health. A traffic change may matter more when it lines up with a new release, campaign, store update, or search indexing issue.
StudioDash is designed to make those relationships easier to review without implying that every provider has complete data for every account.
